Leap is the effect that triggers when you play the card first during your turn

Leap is an effect most Ultra characters have on their cards. Leap effects trigger when you play the corresponding card first in a turn.
Leap effects also always trigger if you play them during an Ultra Round. Ultra Round is the extra turn.
When the current realm is Ultra (or at least partially so), any card you play first in a turn will go into the Ultra Space. Cards in the Ultra Space will be put into your hand during the Ultra Round.

This is the Ultra Space. Cards that you play first on each turn will go in here. You can click on them to see which card it specifically is.
